result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= date
LINE 12:   JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_date AND ch.cre...
                                           ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2022-04-01' AS start_date, DATE '2023-04-10' AS end_date
),
-- owner assignment changes in last 4 quarters
hist AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_date AND ch.createddate < (p.end_date + INTERVAL '1 day')
  WHERE lower(ch.field__c) IN ('owner','ownerid')
),
-- initial assignments based on case.createddate in window
initial AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    NULL::text AS old_owner,
    c.ownerid AS new_owner,
    c.createddate
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON c.createddate >= p.start_date AND c.createddate < (p.end_date + INTERVAL '1 day')
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT * FROM hist
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM initial
),
-- normalize ids by trimming and stripping leading '#'
normalized AS (
  SELECT
    case_id,
    CASE WHEN old_owner IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE regexp_replace(trim(old_owner),'^#','') END AS old_owner_norm,
    CASE WHEN new_owner IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE regexp_replace(trim(new_owner),'^#','') END AS new_owner_norm
  FROM assignments
),
-- handled cases per agent: union of old and new owners involved in assignments
handled AS (
  SELECT old_owner_norm AS agent_id FROM normalized WHERE old_owner_norm IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT new_owner_norm AS agent_id FROM normalized WHERE new_owner_norm IS NOT NULL
),
handled_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) AS handled_cnt
  FROM handled
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 0
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT old_owner_norm AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_cnt
  FROM normalized
  WHERE old_owner_norm IS NOT NULL
    AND new_owner_norm IS NOT NULL
    AND old_owner_norm <> new_owner_norm
  GROUP BY old_owner_norm
)
SELECT hc.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled_counts hc
LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc ON tc.agent_id = hc.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(tc.transfer_cnt,0) ASC, hc.handled_cnt DESC, hc.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2022-04-01' AS start_date, DATE '2023-04-10' AS end_date
),
-- owner assignment changes in last 4 quarters
hist AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_date AND ch.createddate < (p.end_date + INTERVAL '1 day')
  WHERE lower(ch.field__c) IN ('owner','ownerid')
),
-- initial assignments based on case.createddate in window
initial AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    NULL::text AS old_owner,
    c.ownerid AS new_owner,
    c.createddate
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON c.createddate >= p.start_date AND c.createddate < (p.end_date + INTERVAL '1 day')
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT * FROM hist
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM initial
),
-- normalize ids by trimming and stripping leading '#'
normalized AS (
  SELECT
    case_id,
    CASE WHEN old_owner IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE regexp_replace(trim(old_owner),'^#','') END AS old_owner_norm,
    CASE WHEN new_owner IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE regexp_replace(trim(new_owner),'^#','') END AS new_owner_norm
  FROM assignments
),
-- handled cases per agent: union of old and new owners involved in assignments
handled AS (
  SELECT old_owner_norm AS agent_id FROM normalized WHERE old_owner_norm IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT new_owner_norm AS agent_id FROM normalized WHERE new_owner_norm IS NOT NULL
),
handled_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) AS handled_cnt
  FROM handled
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 0
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT old_owner_norm AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_cnt
  FROM normalized
  WHERE old_owner_norm IS NOT NULL
    AND new_owner_norm IS NOT NULL
    AND old_owner_norm <> new_owner_norm
  GROUP BY old_owner_norm
)
SELECT hc.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled_counts hc
LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc ON tc.agent_id = hc.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(tc.transfer_cnt,0) ASC, hc.handled_cnt DESC, hc.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2022-04-01' AS start_date, DATE '2023-04-10' AS end_date
),
-- owner assignment changes in last 4 quarters
hist AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_date AND ch.createddate < (p.end_date + INTERVAL '1 day')
  WHERE lower(ch.field__c) IN ('owner','ownerid')
),
-- initial assignments based on case.createddate in window
initial AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    NULL::text AS old_owner,
    c.ownerid AS new_owner,
    c.createddate
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON c.createddate >= p.start_date AND c.createddate < (p.end_date + INTERVAL '1 day')
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT * FROM hist
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM initial
),
-- normalize ids by trimming and stripping leading '#'
normalized AS (
  SELECT
    case_id,
    CASE WHEN old_owner IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE regexp_replace(trim(old_owner),'^#','') END AS old_owner_norm,
    CASE WHEN new_owner IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE regexp_replace(trim(new_owner),'^#','') END AS new_owner_norm
  FROM assignments
),
-- handled cases per agent: union of old and new owners involved in assignments
handled AS (
  SELECT old_owner_norm AS agent_id FROM normalized WHERE old_owner_norm IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT new_owner_norm AS agent_id FROM normalized WHERE new_owner_norm IS NOT NULL
),
handled_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) AS handled_cnt
  FROM handled
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 0
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT old_owner_norm AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_cnt
  FROM normalized
  WHERE old_owner_norm IS NOT NULL
    AND new_owner_norm IS NOT NULL
    AND old_owner_norm <> new_owner_norm
  GROUP BY old_owner_norm
)
SELECT hc.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled_counts hc
LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc ON tc.agent_id = hc.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(tc.transfer_cnt,0) ASC, hc.handled_cnt DESC, hc.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2022-04-01' AS start_date, DATE '2023-04-10' AS end_date
),
hist AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_date::timestamp
              AND ch.createddate::timestamp < (p.end_date::timestamp + INTERVAL '1 day')
  WHERE lower(ch.field__c) IN ('owner','ownerid')
),
initial AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    NULL::text AS old_owner,
    c.ownerid AS new_owner,
    c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON c.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_date::timestamp
              AND c.createddate::timestamp < (p.end_date::timestamp + INTERVAL '1 day')
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT case_id, old_owner, new_owner FROM hist
  UNION ALL
  SELECT case_id, old_owner, new_owner FROM initial
),
normalized AS (
  SELECT
    case_id,
    CASE WHEN old_owner IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE regexp_replace(btrim(old_owner),'^#','') END AS old_owner_norm,
    CASE WHEN new_owner IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE regexp_replace(btrim(new_owner),'^#','') END AS new_owner_norm
  FROM assignments
),
handled AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT agent_id FROM (
    SELECT old_owner_norm AS agent_id FROM normalized WHERE old_owner_norm IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT new_owner_norm AS agent_id FROM normalized WHERE new_owner_norm IS NOT NULL
  ) x
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT old_owner_norm AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_cnt
  FROM normalized
  WHERE old_owner_norm IS NOT NULL
    AND new_owner_norm IS NOT NULL
    AND old_owner_norm <> new_owner_norm
  GROUP BY old_owner_norm
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc ON tc.agent_id = h.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(tc.transfer_cnt,0) ASC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;
